focus: Specify and pressure-test the generation-consistent structured plus semantic retrieval API and compatibility adapter for styles/_engine.
noveltyJustification: 9 of 9 findings were fully new concrete API, filtering, fusion, pagination, hydration, degradation, or adapter conclusions relative to iterations 1-4.
ruledOut: Raw-score addition across structured, BM25, and cosine channels
Corpus walking as a persistent degraded mode
sourcesQueried: command: bounded Node RRF/filter/cursor pressure test

summary: The v2 request separates hard eligibility, structured ranking signals, channel controls, and bounded page/fusion depth.
Every channel must join a precomputed same-generation eligible ID set before top-k retrieval.
Queries, vectors, cards, cursors, and hydration bind one published generation and retrieval profile.
Versioned weighted RRF over structured, FTS, and vector ranks preserves deterministic attribution without mixing raw scales.
Native responses expose channel health and contribution details while the adapter preserves the legacy CLI and card shape.
Generation-bound keyset cursors paginate a fixed candidateK fusion window deterministically.
sources: command: bounded Node RRF/filter/cursor pressure test, 2026-07-19

summary: Hydration tokens are untrusted locators; generation, rights, containment, digests, mode, and byte limits remain authoritative checks.
Projection failures degrade hybrid to one accelerator plus structured or structured-only SQL, never normal-path corpus walking.
A legacy/shadow/persistent adapter isolates reversible migration from the eventual no-walk persistent query path.
